name: Large Scale — 25+ Node Bioinformatics Pipeline Class Diagram
input: Create a class diagram for a next-generation sequencing analysis pipeline. Classes: abstract class SequenceData (attributes: sampleId, readCount, qualityScore; methods: validate(), getStats()). FastQReader extends SequenceData (filePath, format; readFastQ(), trimAdapters()). BamProcessor extends SequenceData (referenceGenome, mappingQuality; align(), sort(), markDuplicates(), indexBam()). VariantCaller (callerType enum, minDepth int, minQuality float; callSNPs(), callIndels(), filterVariants(), annotateVCF()). QualityControl (thresholds Map, metrics List; runFastQC(), checkCoverage(), generateReport()). Annotator (databases List, version string; annotateGenes(), predictEffect(), queryGnomAD(), checkClinVar()). ReportGenerator (template string, format enum; generatePDF(), generateHTML(), addPlots(), exportCSV()). PipelineConfig (steps List, parallelism int, memory string; loadConfig(), validate(), serialize()). SampleManifest (samples List, metadata Map; parseSampleSheet(), validateBarcodes(), assignLanes()). ResultsDatabase (connection string, schema string; store(), query(), exportResults(), archiveOldRuns()). Show inheritance, composition, and dependency relationships between all classes.
qualityCriteria: Abstract SequenceData class with validate and getStats methods
BamProcessor extends SequenceData with align and markDuplicates methods
VariantCaller class with callSNPs and filterVariants methods
QualityControl class with runFastQC and generateReport
Annotator class with queryGnomAD and checkClinVar methods
ReportGenerator class with generatePDF and exportCSV
At least 10 distinct classes with attributes and methods
Inheritance and dependency relationships shown between classes
